title: Chatsworth Super Patch Grass Seed with Fertiliser Lawn Repair Coir Mix with Micronutrients 600g
features: Chatsworth super patch is specially designed to work in any conditions and any site position around your property. It is fast acting and low maintenance, you can simply apply it to your barren patches, just add water and allow it to grow.

How it works # Chatsworth super patch is an amazing product that works faster and more effectively than other similar products, The formulation provides the ideal atmosphere for the grass to germinate, while activating the root system to strengthen and knit into the area in question.
The 600g formulation contains Coir 88.7%, Fertiliser 1.3% and Grass seed 10% and is best applied March # October when soil is moist.
